[喿]
Ideogrammic compound ( 會意 / 会意 ): 品 ( “ three mouths ” ) + 木 ( “ tree ” ) – chirping of birds in a tree. Original form of 噪 . Similar but unrelated to 果 .

[噪]
Phono-semantic compound ( 形聲 / 形声 , OC *saːws ) and ideogrammic compound ( 會意 / 会意 ): semantic 口 ( “ mouth ” ) + phonetic 喿 ( OC *saːws , “ to chirp ” ) .
Originally written 喿 , see there for more.

[譟] variant form of 噪.
